003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.config.store;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.config.format.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.config.internal.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
028
029/**
030 * A {@link ConfigStore} decorator that layers <b>profile overlays</b> over a delegate store's base config.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Given a set of active profiles (e.g. {@code ["stage"]} or {@code ["base","cloud"]}) and a base config name
034 * {@code N}, a {@code read(N)} returns the base contents from the delegate with each active profile's
035 * {@code N-<profile>} overlay merged on top &mdash; profile wins over base, last-active-profile wins over earlier
036 * ones (see {@link ProfileMerge}).  Reads for any name <i>other</i> than the configured base name pass straight
037 * through to the delegate.
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * <b>Live reload:</b> the store registers a listener on the delegate for the base name <i>and</i> each profile name,
041 * so a change to the base file or any active profile file re-runs the merge and re-fires the change to this store's
042 * own listeners (the {@link ConfigMap} sees a fresh merged contents and reloads).
043 *
044 * <p>
045 * The profile file name is derived from the base name by inserting {@code -<profile>} before the extension
046 * (e.g. base {@code my.cfg} + profile {@code stage} &rarr; {@code my-stage.cfg}); a base with no extension simply
047 * appends {@code -<profile>}.  Writes, existence checks, and name resolution delegate to the wrapped store.
048 *
049 * @since 10.0.0
050 */
051@SuppressWarnings({
052   "resource" // Decorator owns the wrapped delegate store and closes it in close(); the delegate's lifecycle is managed here, not leaked.
053})
054public class ProfileConfigStore extends ConfigStore {
055
056   /**
057    * Builder class.
058    */
059   public static class Builder extends ConfigStore.Builder<Builder> {
060
061      ConfigStore delegate;
062      String baseName;
063      List<String> profiles = new ArrayList<>();
064      ConfigFormat format = IniConfigFormat.INSTANCE;
065
066      /** Constructor, default settings. */
067      protected Builder() {}
068
069      /**
070       * Copy constructor.
071       *
072       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.  Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
073       */
074      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
075         super(assertArgNotNull("copyFrom", copyFrom));
076         this.delegate = copyFrom.delegate;
077         this.baseName = copyFrom.baseName;
078         this.profiles = new ArrayList<>(copyFrom.profiles);
079         this.format = copyFrom.format;
080      }
081
082      /**
083       * Copy constructor.
084       *
085       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.  Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
086       */
087      protected Builder(ProfileConfigStore copyFrom) {
088         super(assertArgNotNull("copyFrom", copyFrom));
089         type(copyFrom.getClass());
090         this.delegate = copyFrom.delegate;
091         this.baseName = copyFrom.baseName;
092         this.profiles = new ArrayList<>(copyFrom.profiles);
093         this.format = copyFrom.format;
094      }
095
096      /**
097       * Sets the wrapped delegate store that supplies the base + profile file contents.
098       *
099       * @param value The delegate store.
100       * @return This object.
101       */
102      public Builder delegate(ConfigStore value) { delegate = value; return this; }
103
104      /**
105       * Sets the base config name whose {@code -<profile>} overlays are merged.
106       *
107       * @param value The base config name.
108       * @return This object.
109       */
110      public Builder baseName(String value) { baseName = value; return this; }
111
112      /**
113       * Sets the active profiles, in activation order (last-active-profile wins).
114       *
115       * @param value The active profile names.
116       * @return This object.
117       */
118      public Builder profiles(List<String> value) { profiles = value == null ? new ArrayList<>() : new ArrayList<>(value); return this; }
119
120      /**
121       * Sets the config format used to parse the base + profile files.
122       *
123       * @param value The format.
124       * @return This object.
125       */
126      public Builder format(ConfigFormat value) { format = value == null ? IniConfigFormat.INSTANCE : value; return this; }
127
128      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
129      public ProfileConfigStore build() {
130         return build(ProfileConfigStore.class);
131      }
132
133      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
134      public Builder copy() {
135         return new Builder(this);
136      }
137   }
138
139   /**
140    * Creates a new builder for this object.
141    *
142    * @return A new builder.
143    */
144   public static Builder create() {
145      return new Builder();
146   }
147
148   private final ConfigStore delegate;
149   private final String baseName;
150   private final List<String> profiles;
151   private final ConfigFormat format;
152   private final ConfigStoreListener reloadListener;
153
154   /**
155    * Constructor.
156    *
157    * @param builder The builder for this object.
158    */
159   public ProfileConfigStore(Builder builder) {
160      super(builder);
161      this.delegate = assertArgNotNull("delegate", builder.delegate);
162      this.baseName = assertArgNotNull("baseName", builder.baseName);
163      this.profiles = List.copyOf(builder.profiles);
164      this.format = builder.format;
165
166      // Re-merge + re-notify whenever the base or any active profile file changes underneath us.
167      this.reloadListener = contents -> {
168         try {
169            update(baseName, mergedContents());
170         } catch (IOException e) {  // HTT: re-merge IO failure only on a real FileStore IO error mid-reload; not reproducible with in-memory stores.
171            throw new ConfigException(e, "Failed to re-merge profile overlays for ''{0}''", baseName);
172         }
173      };
174      delegate.register(baseName, reloadListener);
175      for (var p : profiles)
176         delegate.register(profileName(p), reloadListener);
177   }
178
179   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
180   public Builder copy() {
181      return new Builder(this);
182   }
183
184   @Override /* Overridden from Closeable */
185   public void close() throws IOException {
186      delegate.unregister(baseName, reloadListener);
187      for (var p : profiles)
188         delegate.unregister(profileName(p), reloadListener);
189      delegate.close();
190   }
191
192   @Override /* Overridden from ConfigStore */
193   public boolean exists(String name) {
194      return delegate.exists(name);
195   }
196
197   @Override /* Overridden from ConfigStore */
198   public String read(String name) throws IOException {
199      if (! eq(name, baseName))
200         return delegate.read(name);
201      return mergedContents();
202   }
203
204   @Override /* Overridden from ConfigStore */
205   public String write(String name, String expectedContents, String newContents) throws IOException {
206      return delegate.write(name, expectedContents, newContents);
207   }
208
209   /**
210    * Reads the base + each active profile from the delegate and merges them (profile-wins, last-active-wins).
211    */
212   private String mergedContents() throws IOException {
213      var base = delegate.read(baseName);
214      if (profiles.isEmpty())
215         return base;
216      var overlays = new ArrayList<String>(profiles.size());
217      for (var p : profiles)
218         overlays.add(delegate.read(profileName(p)));
219      return ProfileMerge.merge(delegate, baseName, base, overlays, format);
220   }
221
222   /**
223    * Derives the profile file name from the base name by inserting {@code -<profile>} before the extension.
224    *
225    * @param profile The profile name.
226    * @return The profile config name.
227    */
228   String profileName(String profile) {
229      var dot = baseName.lastIndexOf('.');
230      if (dot < 0)
231         return baseName + "-" + profile;
232      return baseName.substring(0, dot) + "-" + profile + baseName.substring(dot);
233   }
234}
